comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Cuba episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE CUBA COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4dPHgOx

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN CUBA*
  ◦ Old Havana walking tours, Viñales tobacco farms, classic car rides → https://shorturl.at/2tVcG
  ◦ Browse all Cuba experiences → https://shorturl.at/5tLga

*📖 PLAN YOUR CUBA TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Cuba (2025 edition) → https://amzn.to/4fN4ebF
  ◦ Lonely Planet Latin American Spanish Phrasebook → https://amzn.to/4o5TF5N

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO CUBA*
  ◦ Cuba: An American History by Ada Ferrer (Pulitzer Prize winner) → https://amzn.to/4325ikG
  ◦ Dreaming in Cuban by Cristina García (acclaimed novel of revolution and exile) → https://amzn.to/3Pu9qXx

*🍲 BRING CUBA HOME*
  ◦ The Cuban Table by Ana Sofia Pelaez (James Beard nominated cookbook) → https://amzn.to/4vgCtNk
  ◦ Violet Isle by Alex Webb (Magnum photographer's portrait of Cuba) → https://amzn.to/3RObbiP

comments.author: @lesprilib1
comments.text:
A country that stopped in 1959? Really? 👉Cuba holds a unique position in global health, boasting one of the world's highest doctor-to-patient ratios (No. 1 globally at over 8 per 1,000 people) and advanced primary care, with life expectancy and infant mortality rates that rival developed nations.
Cuba boasts one of the highest-ranked education systems in Latin America, often recognized for100% youth literacy and high educational achievement despite economic constraints. It ranks 1st in the region for education quality and 1st globally in government spending on education as a percentage of GDP
Cuban culture is a vibrant, resilient blend of African, Spanish, and Caribbean influences, characterized by a deep love for music, dance, and social connection. Despite economic challenges, the culture thrives on creativity, warmth, and hospitality, featuring iconic elements like salsa, rumba, and a strong, family-oriented community spirit.
